text:
record for each Pioneer ACO provides information on the post-performance year financial settlement
What does this file include? (variable highlights)
- Provider file- Pioneer ACO ID
- Tax identification number
- Provider specialty code

- Beneficiary file- Bene ID
- Pioneer ACO ID
- Aggregated expenditures and claim counts

- Settlement file- Pioneer ACO ID
- Beneficiary counts
- Performance year expenditures and savings

Special considerations
- Each file needs to be specified separately on a
